title: BBA MANAGEMENT
description: The BBA in Management programme introduces students to the principles of business management. The following are the major takeaways from the course:
details:
BBA MANAGEMENT







What is this course?



The BBA in Management programme introduces students to the principles of business management. The following are the major takeaways from the course:



The students learn about the different tools that are used in management studies. Students are taught and polished so that they can communicate effectively.

Students will learn management skills as part of this programme, preparing them to run a successful firm in the future.

This course will teach you the fundamentals of business.

Students learn about topics including marketing management, taxes, human resource management, operations management, financial management tools, and more, allowing them to specialize in a sector of their choice in the future.

The goal of this programme is to provide students with the tools they need to build interpersonal skills, management skills, and entrepreneurship abilities during the course of the course.

The course includes a variety of lectures, internships, and projects to provide students with a broad perspective and prepare them for the profession.

During this course, students are also taught how to be entrepreneurs.



Highlights of the course-



Course Level

Undergraduate

Full-Form

Bachelor of Business Administration

Duration

3 years

Eligibility

Exams from a recognised board for 10+2



Fields/ Streams of the course-

Human Resource manager

Finance Manager

Business consultant

Marketing manager



Why should you study this Course?



There are numerous advantages to earning a BBA in Management. Here are a few examples:

Students obtain a thorough understanding of the principles of management, as well as the interpersonal and analytical abilities required to operate in a variety of businesses.

This course covers the fundamentals of business management and entrepreneurship.

Students are typically placed in marketing organizations, banks, export corporations, and various private and government companies after completing this degree.

With an average yearly pay ranging between INR 2,00,000 and INR 20,00,000, attractive remuneration packages are available.

In this profession, there are numerous job prospects.

It will also open up new doors to prosperous professional options.

To succeed in this industry, you must have excellent communication and interpersonal skills.



What we can do in further/Higher after studying this course-



Following the BBA Management programme, students might pursue the following programmes:



After completing this course, students can apply for a Master of Business Administration programme, which will provide them with greater work options and pay packages.

PGDM - After finishing a BBA in Management programme, students can enroll in a two-year Postgraduate Diploma in Management programme, which provides students with a variety of professional choices.

A Master in Management Studies (MMS) is a postgraduate programme that can be undertaken after completing the BBA Management programme.

BBA graduates with strong skills in resource planning and management, as well as data analysis, will have a number of options in government financial institutions.



Career opportunities after this Course-



Job Profile

Job Description

Management Accountant

A Management Accountant's responsibilities include preparing budgets, reports, and financial statements, as well as conducting internal audits.

Finance Manager

Reports and accounts are monitored, reports are prepared, and financial reports are forecasted.

Human Resource Manager

An HR Manager's responsibilities include developing, implementing, and assessing policies, practices, and employee relations.

Business Administration Researcher

Assist with initiatives, research, data collection, and the creation of new business opportunities.

Marketing Manager

Implementing and executing strategic marketing tactics to boost the company's sales are among the responsibilities.

Production Manager

Planning, establishing schedules, appraising projects, and arranging budgets are all responsibilities.

Research and Development Manager

Conduct research, plan and implement new programmes, and supervise development in the organization.

course graduates?

NPAT: The NMIMS university entrance exam for admission to BBA 2022 and other UnderGraduate programmes at NMIMS University

title: BBA MARKETING
description: BBA Marketing delves into a variety of business management principles and marketing tactics.
details:
BBA MARKETING



What is this course?



BBA Marketing delves into a variety of business management principles and marketing tactics.

It prepares students for jobs in business and marketing by introducing them to marketing concepts and principles.

The course is well-designed; it covers both traditional and modern marketing strategies and equips students to deal with real-world company difficulties.

Special product marketing, search engine marketing, advanced social media marketing, interactive marketing, business economic programmes, and so on are some of the most prominent specialities.

Candidates for the position of Sales Manager, Advertising Executive, Marketing Executive, Market Research Analyst, and others can choose from a variety of professional sectors. With experience and talents, career prospects and remuneration packages expand.



Highlights of the course-



Course Type

Bachelor Program

Course Duration

3 Years

Course Examination Type

Semester-wise or Annual

Course Eligibility

Exams from a recognised board for 10+2



Fields/ Streams of the course-



Advertising account manager.

Copywriter.

Digital marketing analyst.

Director of marketing.

Market research analyst.

Media planner.

Public relations manager.

Social media manager.





Why should you study this Course?



The BBA Marketing programme focuses on advanced marketing and business management, as well as their application in the sector, so there are plenty of opportunities.

The course focuses on the most up-to-date business management and marketing tactics, allowing the applicant to stand out in both the market and their job.

Because marketing is a goal-oriented sector, applicants should focus on studying the details of the business, the art of attracting clients, and client management by applying fundamental business principles and market strategy.

Candidates can also continue their education by pursuing an MBA, MBA in marketing, MBA in Sales and Marketing, or a Masters in Marketing Management. A Postgraduate Diploma in Marketing Management is also an option for the candidate.

A candidate with a bachelor's degree in marketing may expect to earn between INR 3,00,000 and INR 6,00,000 as a beginning salary. With experience and skills, the compensation rises.



What we can do in further/Higher after studying this course-



After earning a BBA in Marketing, you will have a plethora of options. Students can look forward to a bright future in business and marketing.

Candidates can pursue higher education by pursuing an MBA, MBA in marketing, MBA in Sales & Marketing, or a Masters in Marketing Management. A Postgraduate Diploma in Marketing Management is also an option for the candidate.



Career opportunities after this Course-







Job Profile

Job Description

Executive Assistant

An Executive Assistant is a person who is in charge of organizing the schedules and communications of the company's top executives. They organize meetings and corporate events while prioritizing emails and phone calls.

Business Development Executive

A Business Development Executive, sometimes known as a Business Development Manager, is in charge of overseeing the company's business development process in order to ensure its long-term viability.

Account Manager

An account manager is a person who is in charge of building and managing customer connections in order to increase customer satisfaction and retention.

Marketing Executive

Marketing executives, usually referred to as marketing officers or marketing coordinators, are responsible for creating marketing initiatives to promote a service, product, event, or campaign.

Brand Manager

Brand Managers are responsible for ensuring that the goods, services, and product lines that fall under their domain are appealing to current and potential consumers.



What is the entry level salary packages & average salary packages for this

course graduates?

Average Salary

Executive Assistant

2,88,000 INR

Business Development Executive

3,00,000 INR

Account Manager

4,00,000 INR

Marketing Executive

6,28,000 INR

5,00,000 INR



Want to take admission in this course of the best college but how?\



Applicants must take and pass an entrance exam in order to be admitted to the programme:



SET: SET is a university level exam conducted by Symbiosis University, to admit students for UG and Integrated courses programs



NMAT: It is a national level entrance exam for MBA admissions at NMIMS University and other reputable B-Schools in India and worldwide.



SAT: The College Board administers the SAT, a globally known college admissions test that allows high school students to demonstrate what they know and how well they can apply that information to colleges.

Symbiosis International University, Pune

Manipal University, Manipal

Shobhit University, Meerut

title: BBA Retail
description: BBA Retail (Bachelor of Business Administration in Retail Management)
details:
BBA Retail (Bachelor of Business Administration in Retail Management)



What is BBA Retail?





The BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration) in Retail Management or Retail Management is a bachelor's degree in retail management or a degree that covers principles such as retail and retail operations, which is awarded upon successful completion of a three-year retail program. The full course consists of 6 semesters, with the first 4 semesters covering the B.B.A. The last two focus on professional subjects and subjects related to retail operations and management.



Overview/Highlights of this Course-



Level

UG

Duration of the course

3 years

Course fee

9k - 7 lakhs

Minimum qualification

10+2

Selection process

Entrance exam based



Difference between the courses BBA Retail & BBA General – 



BBA General provides a general overview of the subjects with no other specialisation, but BBA Retail enhances the retail management capability of the candidate.



The Cut-offs for BBA Gen. is lower than that of BBA Retail.



BBA Retail is much more preferred by the employers when compared to BBA General.

You can also search for store management jobs such as managing a store and its day-to-day functioning.

title: BBA Supply Chain Management
description: What is BBA Supply Chain Management?
duration: The programme is three years long and is broken down into six six-month semesters.
details:
What is BBA Supply Chain Management?



The B.B.A. in Supply Chain Management is a three-year full-time undergraduate degree that requires the completion of a Senior Secondary Certificate (10+2) from a recognised educational board in any field with a minimum aggregate score of 50%.

The programme is three years long and is broken down into six six-month semesters.

The course is most suited for people who want to work in the shipping industry, which is all about:



Management education with an emphasis on the shipping industry.

freight/supply-related business administration, as well as general management.

Among the many facets of shipping are:

linear trade

port operations charting

customs procedure

transportation and distribution management.

Overview/Highlights of this Course- 

Course Level

Graduation

Duration

3 years

Examination Type

Semester System

Eligibility

10+2, preferably with Commerce subjects, with a minimum aggregate score of 50%.

Admission Process

Merit-based/ Based on counselling after qualification of entrance test

Course Fee

INR 20,000 to 7 lakhs

Average Starting Salary

INR 2 to 10 lakhs

Top Recruiting Companies

Colleges and Universities, Career Vision (Chennai), DIJIK Innovations Pvt. Ltd. (Bangalore), Titan Company Limited (Bangalore), CRPL Limited (Mumbai), Chumbak Design Pvt. Ltd. (Bangalore), etc.

Job Positions

Warehouse Supervisors, Shipping Coordinator, Operations Manager, Export Sales Coordinator, Export Executive, Logistics Coordinator, Expeditor, etc.

Streams of this course-

Resource Management 

ERP 

CRM 

Logistics and Support 

 Stores and Inventory 

Software Industry 

KPO/BPO 

GPS Applications  

Consultancy and Support Services 

Retail Sector 

Production and Manufacturing

Why should you study this course?

 Supply chain management provides a comprehensive picture of the whole business process.

The majority of web-based technologies are aimed towards supply chain management.

Supply Chain Management is concerned with all of the tools and procedures required to compete in today's highly competitive global marketplace.

Both local and multinational businesses may benefit from supply chain management.

Career opportunities after graduating BBA supply chain management:-



Job Position

Job Description

Warehouse Supervisor

Warehouse supervisors are in charge of overseeing the facility employees and ensuring the warehouse's security. Receiving, storing, and distributing items helps them keep track of inventories and supplies.

Export Executive

Export executives are obliged to preserve invoices and keep a record of billing transaction reports as part of their accounting obligations. They must also guarantee that the shipments adhere to the government's set of export norms and regulations.

Expeditor

Expeditors are in charge of making sure that orders are delivered on time. When it comes to delivering food to diners at a restaurant, an expeditor is supposed to keep track of order timing and efficiency.

Operations Manager

Managers of operations are in charge of managing the production of products and/or services. An Operations Manager is in charge of ensuring the company's seamless operation by providing efficient services that fulfil both the company's aims and the expectations of its customers.

 

 

What we can do in further/Higher after studying this course:-

 MBA

PGDM

LLB

Chartered Accountancy [CA]

MMS

Hotel Management

Event Management

Teaching

Advertising & Marketing

Entrepreneurship Development

Data Scientist

Blockchain Expert

Public Services 

 

What are the entry-level salary packages & average salary packages for BBA supply chain management graduates?

 JOB                                                 SALARY

Warehouse Supervisor

2.37 lakhs

Export Executive

5 lakhs

Expeditor

4.10 lakhs

Operations Manager

7 lakhs



 

Want to take admission in this course of the best college but how?

 AIMA-UGAT- The All India Management Association conducts the AIMA UGAT for admission to various UG level management courses across India.

DU JAT: The National Testing Agency (NTA) administers this entrance test for admission to Delhi University's BBA and BHM programmes.

NPAT: The Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies holds this entrance test to give admission to the institution's Undergraduate and Integrated UG-PG Management programmes.

  IPU CET-The IPU Common Entrance Test will be held in 2022. Admissions to the Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) are made either through National Level Tests administered by various bodies or through the University's own Common Entrance Tests (CET).

  Common University Entrance Test (CUET): It is formerly known as the Central Universities Common Entrance Test (CUCET), is an all-India test administered by the National Testing Agency for admission to a variety of Undergraduate, Integrated, Postgraduate, Diploma, Certification, and Research Programs.

title: BBA TOURISM
description: All facets of management are covered in the BBA Tourism curriculum. The subject of travel, tourism, and hospitality management is also included in the course. This is a sector with a lot of potential.
details:
BBA TOURISM





What is this course?



All facets of management are covered in the BBA Tourism curriculum. The subject of travel, tourism, and hospitality management is also included in the course. This is a sector with a lot of potential. 

The course can cover topics including hotel management, marketing, finance, customer service, HR management, and travel and tour operations, in addition to managing tours.

BBA Tourism is a three-year undergraduate tour and travel programme that follows the semester system. A degree in Higher Secondary Examination/10+2 in any stream from a recognised college or university is the minimum requirement for the programme.



Highlights of the course-



Course Level

Graduation

Duration of Course

3 Years

Examination Type

Semester

Eligibility

10+2 from a recognised institution or university in any subject

Admission Process

Merit-based

Course Fee

INR 50,000-2.5 Lacs



Fields/ Streams of the course-



Hospitality Industry.

Forts / Resorts.

Tour Operators.

Immigration and Customs Services.

Ticketing Agencies.

Airlines.

Food Industry.

Transport Corporations.



Why should you study this Course?



The tourism and travel business is one of the world's fastest-growing sectors. As long as there are new regions to discover, there will always be tourists and folks moving around. The tourism and travel industry is not only one of the largest and most profitable in the world, but it is also growing at a rapid pace.

On average, BBA graduates may expect to earn between INR 2 and 15 LPA. Salaries are greater in both commercial and government organizations. Tour and travel management work entails collaborating, coordinating, planning, supervising, and well-organizing.

Graduates of the BBA programme can pursue a range of career pathways in a variety of disciplines. There are numerous government employment and possibilities for higher education available after graduation.





What we can do in further/Higher after studying this course-



Hotel management, travel agency, ticketing, and other areas are available to graduates of the BBA Tourism & Travel Management degree. Students with a BBA in Tour & Travel Management can put their knowledge to good use and excel in their career.

The following courses are available after completing the BBA Tourism and Travel Management Course:

MBA Tourism and Travel: The Master of Business Administration in Travel and Tourism (MBA Tourism and Travel) is a two-year postgraduate programme that introduces students to the travel and tourism sector and prepares them for a career in it. The major goal of this MBA programme is to improve collaboration and negotiation abilities, as well as to learn how to apply theoretical information in real-world situations.It fosters responsiveness to essential industry elements and is a promising programme with promising career prospects.

The Post Graduate Diploma in Travel and Tourism Management: It is a one- to two-year curriculum. Hotel management and other facets of travel and tourism management are covered in the Post Graduate Diploma in Travel and Tourism Management. Students who successfully finish this course will be recognised as accredited travel and tourism managers, operators, and practitioners.

Career opportunities after this Course-

Job Roles

Job Description

Travel Agency Staff

This job is in charge of the company's promotion and marketing. When dealing with customer enquiries, they take into account the customer's needs and preferences for suitable travel solutions.

Travel and Tourism Consultant

They are in charge of advising customers on the best travel options for both home and international destinations.





Travel Agent

Assisting people with vacation planning, selection, and arrangements is part of this job. In most cases, they will work within the customer's budget.

Tour Operator

From beginning to end, they are in control of the tour. They also take care of the little details of a vacation or tour, such as hotel accommodations, food, and transportation.

Ticketing Staff

As part of this job, you'll be supporting travelers with trip planning. They answer questions about travel planning such routes and schedules.

Air hostess

Working with security to ensure that passengers on a plane have a nice journey is part of the job description.







What is the entry level salary packages & average salary packages for this

course graduates?



Job Roles

Average Salary

Travel Agency Staff

INR 2,00,000

Travel and Tourism Consultant

INR 3,00,000

Travel Agent

INR 2,00,000

Tour Operator

INR 4,00,000

Ticketing Staff

INR 2,50,000

Air hostess

INR 5,00,000





Want to take admission in this course of the best college but how?



Some entrance exams conducted by colleges are:

IPMAT: It is an aptitude test for admission to IIM Indore and IIM Rohtak's five-year IPM programme.

AIMA administers the Under Graduate Aptitude Test (UGAT): Applicants for several undergraduate programm

title: BBA in sports management
details:
BBA in sports management



What is BBA in sports management?



This course is meant to provide students the organisational and communication skills they'll need to manage sporting events, teams, federations, and clubs. Students will become successful leaders and managers in the sports sector after completing this course.



Students who pursue a BBA in Sports Management improve their communication and technical abilities while also learning about business planning and management. This course is best suited for students who have excellent leadership and communication abilities.

The BBA in Sports Management focuses on bringing management and commercial ideas to the sports industry. This programme is for students who want to pursue a management degree in the subject of sports management.



This programme is designed for students who excel in sports. If you want to put your passion for sports and fitness to good use by expanding your knowledge in the field of sports administration, this course will be a great fit for you.





Overview/Highlights of this Course-

 

Course Level

Graduation

Duration

3 years

Examination Type

Semester System

Eligibility

10+2 in Any Stream

Admission

Based on Merit in Class 12

Course Fee

Around INR 3,00,000

Average Starting Salary

INR 2,00,000 to INR 6,00,000

Top Recruiting Organisations

NFL, NBA, MLB, LPGA, NASL, NAIA, IISM, Nike, Puma, Adidas etc.

Top Recruiting Areas

College and Universities, Government Organisations, Sports Franchises, Sports Merchandise Manufacturers, Sports Broadcasters, Event Management Firms.

Streams/Fields of this course

Marketing and Promotions

Sponsorship and negotiations

Governance of sports

Facilities planning 

Sports event management 

 Why should you study this course??

   The curriculum is created in accordance with the most recent trends and needs in the global sports sector.

The curriculum was created via the collaboration of experienced faculty members and industry leaders to provide students with an industry-relevant education.

Students build an autonomous identity via extracurricular activities and project-based study, making them employable professionals.

After completing this degree, students can pursue a worldwide career.

       Career opportunities after graduating BBA in sports management:-

 



Sports Instructor

Demonstrate and explain the skills and rules needed for a particular sport. Basically, the work of a Sports Instructor is to provide training to sportspersons.

Management Trainee

MT is an individual who undergoes training for managerial or supervisory positions. He is responsible for working with other managers to plan and perform the work in the organisation.

Sports Nutritionist

Sports nutritionists are in charge of dietary guidance, as well as assisting athletes in improving their stamina and endurance.

Procurement Manager

Procurement Managers work for major corporations and are in charge of supervising and organising procurement agents, buyers, and purchasing agents, as well as assisting with the company's most difficult acquisitions.

Sales Manager

The Sales Manager assists in guiding the focus of the team, setting goals, analysing data, and assisting in the creation of job possibilities.

Event Manager

The Event Manager is in charge of organising and executing the event; he is the one who oversees the entire event from start to finish.

What we can do in further/Higher after studying this course:-

 MBA 

MBA in Sports management 

What are the entry-level salary packages & average salary packages for BBA in sports management graduates?

 

Sports Instructor

INR 3,00,000 per year to INR 6,00,000

Management Trainee

Around INR 3,00,000 per year

Sports Nutritionist

INR 2,00,000 to INR 4,00,000

Procurement Manager

INR 3,00,000 to INR 6,00,000

Sales Manager

INR 1,80,000 to INR 3,20,000

Event Manager

INR 2,00,000 to INR 4,00,000

Want to take admission in this course of the best college but how??

There are a few entrance exams for this test. 

SMAT- Sports management admission test.  

Nrti-aat-    The National Railway and Transportation Institute (NRTI) conducts this entrance exam.                          

 List of top colleges in India related  



National Academy of Sports Management

International Institute of Sports Management

Christ College of Science and Management

Weblord Institute of Sports Management

title: Bachelor Of Banking and Insurance
details:
Bachelor Of Banking and Insurance



What is BBI?

Bachelor of banking and insurance (BBI) is a 3-3.5-year programme that seeks to provide students with excellent fundamental knowledge in the domains of banking, finance, and insurance, as well as other associated subjects such as business communication, insurance law, and accounting.

You will not only master the theoretical parts of the courses, but you will also be prepared to apply new banking policies, numerous insurance regulatory acts, market changes, and much more.

The emphasis on the theoretical side will be readily offset by engaging and participatory case studies as well as industrial visits. After completing the BBI course, you will be prepared to face the difficulties of the business world by using your fundamental understanding of two key industries that is banking and insurance



Overview/Highlights of this Course-

 

Name of the course

BBI

BBI Course Full-Form

Bachelor of Banking and Insurance

Duration

3- years

Type of course

Undergraduate

Eligibility

Passed in 10 +2

Fee Paid

Rs 14,000- 5,00,000/-

BBI Course Job Opportunities

Bank Manager, Finance Officer, Insurance Manager, Consultant, Treasurer, Risk manager, KPO Executive, Credit and cash managers.

BBI Course Salary offered

Rs 1,20,000/- to Rs 5,00,000/-





Streams/Fields of the BBI-

 Streams related to this field are as follows:

Principles of Management

Insurance

Customer Relationship

Investor Relations

Financial Markets

Investment and Portfolio Management

Cost Accounting

Banking Laws

Organisational Behaviour

Management Accounting

International Banking

Business Ethics and Communication

Financial reporting and Analysis





Why Should you opt for BBI??

 Fast-Growing Sector — The country's banking and insurance sectors are rapidly expanding. Profits are increasing as businesses hire more youthful workers.

Numerous Career Options - A Bachelor’s in banking and insurance may lead to a variety of opportunities. The majority of undergraduate degrees do not provide such advantages.

The Best Companies - The country's and world's largest corporations are leading the charge in employing Bachelor’s  in banking and insurance graduates.

Excellent Salary and Perks - Because the finest organisations hire, they also pay their employees well and provide them with great benefits.

Since the Bachelor’s  in banking and insurance degree course, education has placed a strong focus on personal development.



Career opportunities after graduating BBI :-

1. Auditor - An auditor is a specialist who examines financial statements for errors and inconsistencies. Auditors might work for businesses or give one-on-one services.



2. Accountant - An accountant is a professional who is in charge of a company's financial accounting. They must keep the books balanced at all times.



3. Insurer - An insurer's primary responsibility is to offer insurance to its customers. The necessity to assess their clients' income, assets, and finances in order to provide appropriate insurance.



4. Financial Advisor - A financial advisor helps customers invest and increase their assets and money by providing financial advice.

5. Credit & Risk Manager - The credit & risk manager's primary responsibility is to manage credit and mitigate risk in their employer's business and assets.







 

What we can do in further/Higher after studying this course:-

Higher studies in this field are as follows-

Master of Business Administration in Banking & Insurance (MBA in Banking & Insurance)

Post Graduate Diploma in Management in Banking & Insurance (PGDM in Banking & Insurance)

Masters in Law in Banking & Insurance (LLM in Banking & Insurance)

Bachelor of Education in Banking & Insurance (B. Ed in Banking & Insurance)

Chartered Accountant (CA)

Company Secretary (CS)

Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA)

Financial Risk Manager (FRM)

INR 2,64,000

INR 1,77,000

INR 6,13,000

INR 2,02,000

INR 4,24,000

title: BACHELOR IN ECONOMICS
details:
BACHELOR IN ECONOMICS





What is a Bachelor in Economics?



A BA in Economics includes the study of several economic theories, econometrics, applied economics, and other fields. Students can study BA in Economics studies after clearing the class 12th board examinations.



Demand and Supply, Indian Economic History, National Income, Inflation and Deflation, Production and Supply, and other topics are studied in a BA in Economics. The importance of statistics is woven throughout the curriculum since economics is a science that deals with a lot of data.







Because of the multiple possibilities available, the number of persons interested in studying Economics has expanded considerably over the last decade. As a starting package, BA in Economics graduates may anticipate to earn between INR 4 and 7 LPA.



Highlights of the course



Name of the Course

Bachelor of Arts in Economics

Course Level

Undergraduate

Course Duration

3 years

Course Mode

Regular / Full time

Course Eligibility Criteria

Class 12th Board exams with 50% aggregate marks

Course Admission Process

Merit Based / Entrance Exams

Average Course Fees (INR)

45,000

Average Salary (INR)

3 - 4.5 LPA

Areas of Employment

Government / Private Banks, Finance & Banking Sectors, Trade Markets





Streams related to this course



Indian Economic Services (IES) 

Development sector

Management.

Consulting

Finance

Civil Services

 International economics

 Monetary economics

 Further mathematics

Development economics

Behavioural economics 

Public policy

Why should you opt for this course?

Work in a Wide Range of Industries and Dimensions: With an economics degree, you may work in a wide range of industries and dimensions. It allows you to take advantage of a wide range of options. An economist can work in a range of settings, such as business, government, university, and private sector.



Strong Foundational Knowledge: Because of the diversity and breadth of topics covered by an economics degree, it may serve as the groundwork for a variety of well-paying employment. The economics curriculum will assist you in gaining a comprehensive grasp of finance, markets, and resource management.

Economic difficulties will drive you to participate in thought-provoking activities in your schoolwork and to employ critical thinking skills. You will face a number of difficulties throughout the course that will help you better understand international economics and how it influences a variety of global business issues.



Career Opportunities after completing this course



Job Profiles

Job Description

Investment Banker

Investment bankers advise major corporations on financial matters and, in certain cases, act as government advisors. They work with their clients to help them raise money. They are in charge of, among other things, issuing stock, floating bonds, and negotiating the acquisition of a rival.

Financial Analyst

A Financial Analyst is in charge of gathering information, compiling spreadsheets, writing reports, and doing non-legal due diligence on potential acquisitions.

Stock Broker

A stock broker is a professional trader who buys and sells stock for customers. A registered representative or investment advisor is another term for a stock broker.

AuditorI

An auditor's job is to examine financial records of corporations and organisations to ensure that they are accurate and lawful.







Higher studies after completing this course

Business Administration (MBA)

MA in Economics

Finance

Management

International Relations

Foreign trade analyst M.A. in Economics

M.A. in Mass Communication (MMC)

M.Sc. in Advertisement & Journalism 



What are the entry-level salary packages & average salary packages for BA economics graduates?





Job Profiles

Average Salary (INR)

Investment Banker

6 - 8 LPA

Financial Analyst

5.5 - 9 LPA

Stock Broker

6 - 9 LPA

Auditor

4 - 8 LPA

Systems Analyst

4 - 6 LPA

PUCET- Patna University's Patna Women's College is a constituent college. title: BFM (bachelor of financial market)
details:
BFM (bachelor of financial markets) 



What is a Bachelor of Financial market? 

 The Bachelor of Financial Markets (BFM) is a three-year undergraduate degree that focuses on the intricacies of financial markets and includes topics such as economics, financial hazards, and investing. 

It also includes practical areas of study such as planning, coordinating, and managing capital resources. BFM is a course that might interest you if you're interested in the nuances of how the market works and want to make a profession out of it.

Overview/Highlights of this Course-

  

Course

Specification

level

UG

Course type

Degree Program

Specialisation

Financial Market

Course Duration

3 years

Min Qualification

10+2

Admission process

By clearing entrance exams

Relevant Field

Commerce & Finance

Job Profile

Financial Risk Manager, CA, Financial Consultant, Financial Analyst, Company secretary, etc



Streams/Fields of the MBBS-

 Finance

Insurance

Consultancy Firms

Accountancy

Banking Sector

Stock Market

Share and Capital markets

 

Why should you opt for BFM ?

Students who work hard to finish the course will get great critical thinking. This course is extremely beneficial in understanding the financial market since it covers how an investor trades stocks, bonds, commodities, and other financial instruments on stock exchanges or stock markets.

The training will transform you from a novice to someone who can rapidly grasp the basic principles and processes that are often ignored while trading financial products.

The course will concentrate on the country's primary financial markets and how they influence the economy.

You will learn about the peculiarities of such markets, as well as other information.

You will also learn how to compute stock and bond prices.abilities.



Career opportunities after graduating MBBS:-

 After completing the BFM course, a graduate can seek training from a competent professional or pursue a career as an accountant. If students desire to continue their study in their chosen subject, they will enrol in the M.Com in Finance Market and the PhD programme. Candidates can readily find a wide range of career prospects in both Indian and international industries after completing their higher education. Many government and commercial sector employers in India hired BFM graduates. Among them are the following:

Public Accounting Firms

Markets Research

Budget planning firm

Consultancies

Corporation House

Educational institutions, etc.

 

These professionals are capable of resolving financial concerns.

Risk Manager: The Risk Manager has the authority to devise anti-risk strategies. They are a part of any corporation or organisation in order to identify potential losses in the future.

A Finance Officer: A finance officer is trained in professional abilities that they can use to help the firm achieve its objectives, such as processing all records, investigating all losses, and maintaining bookkeeping data, among other things.

Financial controllers are capable of overseeing all aspects of a financial organisation, including administrative, auditing, and corporate bookkeeping.An insurance manager is in charge of the day-to-day operations of an insurance company. 



What we can do in further/Higher after studying this course:-

 

The person can go for further studies like completing courses in Financial Risk Manager, MBA (Finance), Chartered Finance Analyst (CFA) etc. 

What are the entry-level salary packages & average salary packages for MBBS  graduates?

The entry level salary package for BFM is as follows- 

Financial Controller – INR 3, 974,400 Annual PayScale

Treasurer – INR 16,50,000 Annual Pay Scale

 Finance Officer—Approx. INR 8,00,000 Annual Pay Scale

  Risk Manager – Approx. INR 9,50,000 Annual Pay Scale

 Insurance Manager – INR 8,00,000 Annual Pay Scale                                  

Popular entrance exams to get admission in this course-

Aligarh Muslim University Entrance Exam- This exam is conducted by Aligarh muslim university for their various graduate and post graduate courses.

Mumbai University Entrance Test-This exam is conducted by Mumbai University for their various graduate and postgraduate courses.

Delhi University Entrance Exam-This exam is conducted by Delhi University for their various graduate and postgraduate courses.

List of top colleges in India related MBBS:-

BFM Course 2022: Top Colleges in India

Shri Ram College of Commerce, Delhi

Lady Shri Ram College for Women, Delhi

Loyola College, Chennai

Xavier's College, Mumbai

Hindu College, New Delhi

Institute of Management- Christ University, Bangalore

Symbiosis College of Arts and Commerce, Pune

Andrew College of Arts Science & Commerce, Mumbai

Narsee Monjee colleges of Commerce and Economics, Mumbai

Joseph College Of Commerce, Bangalore

title: Bachelor of management studies
details:
BACHELOR OF MANAGEMENT STUDIES



What is this course?





Bachelor of management studies is a three-year undergraduate programme that teaches management principles and ideas. Various universities and colleges around the country, including some famous ones like Delhi University, offer the subject.



The Bachelor of Management Studies program is comparable to the BBA program. However, this course places a greater focus on analytical research. Managerial Economics, Business Accounting, Macroeconomics, Business Research, Financial Management, Management Practices, and so on are all covered. 

In India, the cost of a Bachelor of Management Studies ranges from 15,000 to 1,50,000 INR depending on the institute. In comparison to private institutions, the cost of earning a Bachelor of Management degree is lower in government colleges.



Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) programs assist students in studying business and management strategies, and graduates may anticipate lucrative careers in corporate industries, managerial roles, and startups, among other professions.

 The applicant can start their own firm after finishing the course because it is meant to teach pupils entrepreneurial abilities. The training provides an excellent chance for leaders to advance their careers as managers or outstanding entrepreneurs.





An overview of the course



Bachelor of Business Management is the full name of the programme.

Entrance examinations are used to determine who gets into the programme. A GD round, presentations, and other elements of the admissions process may be included. Direct admission is also available at some colleges based on merit or other factors.

Shaheed Sukhdev College of Business Studies, St.Xaviers Mumbai, Christ University, Narsee Monjee, and Symbiosis Pune are among the top institutions that provide BMS.

Marketing Management, Finance and Accounting, Digital Marketing, Human Resources, Business Analysis, Entrepreneurship, Hospitality, IT, Travel and Tourism, Hotel Management, and more specialities are available in the course.

After finishing the BMS course, students can pursue an MBA, work in corporate settings, or establish their own business.



Why should you pursue this course? 



The following are the reasons why you should pursue this course.

\

Prior to real-world situations, doing a Bachelor of Management Studies course can help you build managerial abilities, including communication, organisation, leading, reporting, and teamwork.

Bachelor of Management Studies can also assist potential entrepreneurs advance their careers by providing insight into the corporate world. It can also serve as a springboard for someone who wishes to start their own firm right after college.

Students are offered a variety of management level employment once they complete the course, which might help them create business relationships.



BMS specialisation 



Accounting and finance 

Marketing management 

Human resources 

Business analytics 

IT 

Entrepreneurship

Hospitality

Travel and tourism

Hotel management

Career opportunities after graduating from this course

Professionals with a management background are in high demand in the corporate sector. Graduates of the BMS programme have an advantage over students from other backgrounds due to increased demand and fantastic prospects.

This offers them an advantage over others in terms of advancing their careers in management.

The table below lists some of the popular careers that someone with a BMS degree can pursue:

Marketing Manager

Sales Manager

Executive Assistant

Business Development Manager

BACHELOR OF MANAGEMENT STUDIES



What is this course?





Bachelor of management studies is a three-year undergraduate programme that teaches management principles and ideas. Various universities and colleges around the country, including some famous ones like Delhi University, offer the subject.



The Bachelor of Management Studies program is comparable to the BBA program. However, this course places a greater focus on analytical research. Managerial Economics, Business Accounting, Macroeconomics, Business Research, Financial Management, Management Practices, and so on are all covered. 

In India, the cost of a Bachelor of Management Studies ranges from 15,000 to 1,50,000 INR depending on the institute. In comparison to private institutions, the cost of earning a Bachelor of Management degree is lower in government colleges.



Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) programs assist students in studying business and management strategies, and graduates may anticipate lucrative careers in corporate industries, managerial roles, and startups, among other professions.

 The applicant can start their own firm after finishing the course because it is meant to teach pupils entrepreneurial abilities. The training provides an excellent chance for leaders to advance their careers as managers or outstanding entrepreneurs.





An overview of the course



Bachelor of Business Management is the full name of the programme.

Entrance examinations are used to determine who gets into the programme. A GD round, presentations, and other elements of the admissions process may be included. Direct admission is also available at some colleges based on merit or other factors.

Shaheed Sukhdev College of Business Studies, St.Xaviers Mumbai, Christ University, Narsee Monjee, and Symbiosis Pune are among the top institutions that provide BMS.

Marketing Management, Finance and Accounting, Digital Marketing, Human Resources, Business Analysis, Entrepreneurship, Hospitality, IT, Travel and Tourism, Hotel Management, and more specialities are available in the course.

After finishing the BMS course, students can pursue an MBA, work in corporate settings, or establish their own business.



Why should you pursue this course? 



The following are the reasons why you should pursue this course.

\

Prior to real-world situations, doing a Bachelor of Management Studies course can help you build managerial abilities, including communication, organisation, leading, reporting, and teamwork.

Bachelor of Management Studies can also assist potential entrepreneurs advance their careers by providing insight into the corporate world. It can also serve as a springboard for someone who wishes to start their own firm right after college.

Students are offered a variety of management level employment once they complete the course, which might help them create business relationships.



BMS specialisation 



Accounting and finance 

Marketing management 

Human resources 

Business analytics 

IT 

Entrepreneurship

Hospitality

Travel and tourism

Hotel management

Career opportunities after graduating from this course

Professionals with a management background are in high demand in the corporate sector. Graduates of the BMS programme have an advantage over students from other backgrounds due to increased demand and fantastic prospects.

This offers them an advantage over others in terms of advancing their careers in management.

The table below lists some of the popular careers that someone with a BMS degree can pursue:

Marketing Manager

Sales Manager

Executive Assistant

Business Development Manager

Finance Manager

Operations Manager

Teacher

HR Manager

In other places, you may easily start earning about INR 2-3 LPA and work your way up to INR 4-5 LPA after two to three years of expertise.

Exam name

MUCMET-  Every year, the Mumbai University Common Management Entrance Test, or MUCMET, is held for admission to the university's Thane Sub Campus's Integrated BMS+MBA programme. On May 23, 2022, the MUCMET 2022 exam will be held.

AIMA UGAT- All India management association administers the Under Graduate Aptitude Test (UGAT) yearly to screen applicants for various undergraduate programmes such as Integrated MBA (IMBA), BBA, BCA, BHM, B.Com, and others.

CUET- The Common University Entrance Test, formerly known as the Central Universities Common Entrance Test, is an all-India test administered by the National Testing Agency for admission to 45 Central Universities of India's Undergraduate, Integrated, Postgraduate, Diploma, Certification, and Research Programs.

Individuals with a creative or design flare should enrol in the course, as it will help them transform their amateur or naive skills into creative masterminds.

With time and experience in the field, the salary would rise sharply, eventually reaching INR 10,00,000 per year. However, this varies by city, with the highest salary available in areas such as Bangalore, Hyderabad, and others, ranging from INR 70,000 to INR 85,000 per month.

Modeling

Building 

Technology

The process of planning and constructing buildings and other forms of structures is known as building engineering technology. Students who get a bachelor's degree in building engineering technology are prepared to manage construction projects as well as design, implement, and maintain building components.

Graphic Design

Graphic design is a type of art that has a specific purpose. It entails devising a creative and systematic strategy for resolving a problem or achieving specific goals, which may include the use of visuals, symbols, or even words. It is the artistic expression of concepts and ideas through the use of diverse graphic elements and technologies.

Community Design

Community design is a practice that is founded on the concept that professional technological knowledge is frequently insufficient in resolving social problems.

Computer-

Aided Design

Architects, engineers, drafters, artists, and others utilise CAD (computer-aided design) software to create precise drawings or technical images. CAD/CAM (computer-aided design/computer-aided manufacturing) software is used to design goods like computer circuit boards and other electrical devices.

Engineering

Engineering is a scientific area and occupation that entails applying our scientific knowledge of the natural world to innovate, design, and construct objects that solve problems and achieve practical goals. Roads, bridges, automobiles, planes, machinery, tools, procedures, and computers are all examples of this.

Environment /Sustainability

Environmental sustainability is described as appropriate engagement with the environment to avoid natural resource depletion or deterioration and to ensure long-term environmental quality.

Housing

Housing, or more broadly, living spaces, refers to the collective construction and assigned usage of houses and buildings to shelter people — the planning or provision made by an authority, with associated definitions.



Want to get yourself enrolled in the best B.Arch. colleges?

Candidates can enrol in this programme by taking the NATA or another architectural entrance test.

B Arch Exams- 

Starting to prepare for NATA or any other entrance exam in advance might help you gain a spot at a prestigious university/college. The exams are divided into five primary sections:



Physics

Mathematics

Chemistry

Logical Reasoning

General Aptitude



NATA-



The main BArch entry exam is the NATA. In 2020, more than 30,000 students took the exam. The Council of Architecture conducts this national level exam for admission to various central, national, and state-level architectural colleges across India.

JEE Mains-



JEE Main is a national entrance test for undergraduate engineering and architecture programmes at 23 IITs, 31 NITs, 26 IIITs, 29 Other-GFTIs, and IIEST, Shibpur. Apart from NATA, students can apply for B Arch admission based on their JEE Mains performance.

title: B.Tech General
details:
B. TECH - BACHELOR OF TECHNOLOGY

About the course-

Bachelor of Technology is the name of the course. It is an undergraduate programme for students in the scientific stream who have finished Class 12 Science.

Engineering universities across India, including premier colleges like IITs and NITs, provide a 4-year degree.

The majority of B. Tech (Bachelor of Technology) programmes are application and skill-based.



Their main goal is to teach students how to comprehend the technology behind how devices work and how to change or improve the quality of their job. B. Tech programmes are courses that focus on developing specific skills.

They place a strong emphasis on the curriculum's practical aspects.

Overview of the course-

Particulars

Details

Name of degree

Bachelor of Technology

Commonly known as

BTech

Degree level

Undergraduate

Course duration

4 years

Admission process

Entrance test followed by counselling

Annual course fee

INR 2 to 5 lakh

Top institutes

IITs, NITs, IIITs, VIT, SRMIST, BITS, etc.

Top recruiters

Google, Apple, Hindustan Unilever Ltd, ISRO,

Specialisations

Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineer, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineer, Marine Engineer and

 more



List of popular BTech branches offered in India-

In India, there are various branches offered in B.Tech. Some of popular branches are present below-

Computer Science Engineering

Mechanical Engineering

Electronics and communication engineering

 Aeronautical Engineering

Civil Engineering

Electrical Engineering

Chemical Engineering

Information technology

 Automobile Engineering

Biotechnology

Artificial intelligence

Biomedical engineering

Environmental engineering

Software engineering

Chemistry

Mechatronics

Industrial engineering

Metallurgy

Data science

Mining engineering

Petroleum Engineering

Instrumentation and control engineering

Manufacturing engineering

Marine engineering



Why should you study B.Tech -

A LONG-TERM CAREER-



Because the world will always need well-trained, talented, and highly qualified engineers in several fields, engineering is a safe and predictable career choice. 

The automobile industry, the IT sector, and even the financial sector rely significantly on various types of engineers to run successful organisations. 

So, if you are studying engineering from a top Indian institute they will give you the necessary training and industry exposure and you will get a solid and financially rewarding profession.



QUALIFICATIONS THAT ARE RECOGNIZED AROUND THE WORLD



Engineering is a worldwide profession, therefore earning a B. Tech engineering degree will provide you with a plethora of chances. 

Most leading engineering colleges in India have partnerships with overseas educational institutions and corporations, allowing their students to get worldwide experience through student exchange programmes and international internships. 

With a few years of work experience and a B. Tech engineering degree, you may find a challenging career anywhere around the globe.



A CAREER THAT IS BOTH CREATIVE AND FUTURISTIC



Engineers are always the world's inventors & problem solvers.

Therefore, you'll have to think creatively.. 



If you enjoy challenges and want to work in a fast-paced environment, this is a perfect field for you.



DIVERSE SPECIALISATIONS



Engineering is a broad field with numerous specialisations to select from, based on your interests and abilities. 

Admissions to B. Tech programmes in aerospace engineering, civil engineering, mechanical engineering, electrical and electronics engineering, and even computer engineering specialisations like artificial intelligence, machine learning, cloud technology, cyber security, robotic process automation, and cloud computing are now open for 2021. 

All of these specialisations are cutting-edge and have a wide range of applications, so you can pick the one that best fits your professional objectives.



MASSIVE SCOPE FOR FURTHER EDUCATION



Because B. Tech engineering is an undergraduate degree, you have a lot of options for pursuing an M. Tech degree to advance your abilities and knowledge in the domain you've selected. 

Professionals at most major companies are expected to have competitive qualifications that will help them perform better at their jobs. If you want to start your firm. You can do a B. Tech degree with an MBA degree to have the best of both worlds: an engineering and business management background. 

After a B. Tech degree, you have a variety of possibilities for future study, no matter which path you take.

B.Tech  job opportunities-

INR 1.5 LPA

INR 8.5 LPA

What we can do in further studies after this course-

Following engineering, higher education is the second most popular job path. Aspirants naturally take admission to an M.Tech programme after completing the B.Tech study. You can study for the GATE (Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering) exam, which will assess your knowledge of undergraduate engineering subjects and assist you to gain admission to IITs and NITs for M.Tech programmes.

Another alternative is to study for the JAM exam to gain admission to master in Science programmes at some of India's leading schools.

Candidates can pursue short-term and diploma courses after completing their B.Tech programme in addition to these degree programmes. Certifications have numerous advantages, including the following:

Increase your knowledge and abilities.

Boost your earning potential

Give you a leg up on the competition

Increase your professional credibility

Enhance the pay scale



Some popular certification and professional courses after B.Tech that candidates can take up include:

Popular Certification and Professional Courses after B.Tech

Information Security & Ethical Hacking

Red Hat Certified Engineer

C, C++, Java, .NET, SQL

Web Designing

Software Testing

Borland Database Engine (BDE)

Embedded Technology

Robotics

Nanotechnology

Six Sigma

Kanban Certification

Primavera Training

ISO Lead Auditor Courses

Building Design Certification

Technical Drawing & Designing

Construction Supervisor Certification



Want to get into the best B.tech college?



BTech Entrance Exams-

The All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and the National Board of Accreditation are responsible for regulating all technical programmes in India, including BTech (NBA). Admissions to B.Tech programmes take place through national level/state-level/institute-level engineering entrance examinations. The following are the top five engineering entrance examinations that a substantial number of students take each year:

JEE Main- It is a national entrance examination for BTech admissions to NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs. It is administered by the National Testing Agency. Paper 1 (BE/BTech) and Paper 2 (BArch/BPlan) are the two papers in JEE Main.

JEE Advanced- It is a national level entrance examination for IIT BTech admissions. To take JEE Advanced, students must first pass JEE Main.

VITEEE - One of the most popular private institute entrance exams, VITEEE admits students to Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) and its multiple campuses' BTech programmes.

MHT CET - Students can apply for BTech admissions to Maharashtra B BTech institutes through the MHT CET.

TS EAMCET - TS EAMCET offers admissions to students in the Telangana state institutes based on their scores in the entrance examination.

title: Bachelors in Computer Application
details:
Bachelors in Computer Application



What is Bachelors in Computer Application?



The full form of BCA is Bachelors in Computer Application. The Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) is a three-year undergraduate degree programme that focuses on the foundations of computer application and software development.

 A bachelor's degree in computer science or information technology is comparable to a bachelor's degree in technology. Students can use the degree to build a strong academic basis for a future job in Computer Applications. 

The BCA programme covers database management systems, operating systems, software engineering, web technologies, and languages such as C, C++, HTML, Java, and others. The cost of a BCA might range anywhere from INR 37,500 to INR 5 lakh.



Overview of the Course



BCA Course Level

Undergraduate Degree

BCA Full Form

Bachelor of Computer Applications

BCA Duration

3 years

BCA Eligibility

Minimum 50% marks in 10+2 in any relevant stream with English as a mandatory subject

BCA Admission Process

Either by Entrance Exams or by Merit

BCA Course Fees

Up to 2 to 3 Lakhs

BCA Subjects

Data Structures, Operating Systems, Database Management, User Interface Design, etc.

BCA Salary

Up to 4 Lakhs per annum

BCA Recruiting Companies

Wipro, Infosys, NIIT, HCL, TCS, Accenture, Capgemini, and others









Fields of the BCA-

 Database

Networking

 data structure

core programming languages

software engineering

object-oriented programming

web scripting

development

Why Should you opt for BCA ??

 A BCA degree provides up a plethora of work options in a variety of sectors, particularly in the IT industry.

The BCA programme and the BTech programme are substantially identical. The key benefit of BCA over BTech is that it is a three-year programme rather than a four-year one.

BCA specialisations, as well as Data Science, Data Analytics, and Computer Science degrees, are available at a few universities. Starting with online computer courses is a wonderful idea.

Students can also seek further education, such as an MCA, to get an edge and update their skills and experience, which can lead to development in their careers.

Students gain expertise in commonly used programming languages such as JAVA, C++, Python, CSS, Linux, and others, while also improving their technical abilities.



 

Career opportunities after graduating BCA:-

 

BCA Job

Job Description

Software Developer

The primary responsibility of a software developer is to do research, create, execute, and manage software products, as well as to guarantee that they run smoothly.

System Analyst

System analysts are primarily responsible for analysing and designing feasible IT-based solutions to business problems.

Web Designer

The layout of a website is generally designed and adjusted by web designers.

Technical Associate

The primary responsibility of a Technical Associate is to assist the administrative staff of the firm with day-to-day technical issues.

Customer Support Technician

Customer Service The major responsibility of a technician is to find solutions to computer system problems such as troubleshooting and the like.

IT Technical Support Developer

Their job is to detect hardware issues and assist consumers with app and software downloads.

What we can do in further/Higher after studying this course:-

 Master of Computer Applications(MCA)

Masters Degree in Information Management (MIM)

Masters in Computer Management (MCM)

Post Graduate Program in Corporate Studies (PGPCS)

Information Security Management (ISM)

Master of Business Administration (MBA)

What are the entry-level salary packages & average salary packages for BCA graduates?

 

BCA Job

Average Salary

Software Developer

INR 5 LPA

System Analyst

INR 6 LPA

Web Designer

INR 3 LPA

Technical Associate

INR 2.15 LPA

Customer Support Technician

INR 2.5 LPA

IT Technical Support Developer

INR 3.15 LPA



Popular entrance exams to get admission in BCA Course-

 

 

IPU-CET- Exams for admission. The IPU Common Entrance Test will be held in 2022. Admissions to the Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) are made either through National Level Tests administered by various bodies or through the University's own Common Entrance Tests (CET).

AIMA-UGAT- The AIMA Undergraduate Aptitude Test (UGAT) is a typical entrance test for undergraduate programmes such Integrated MBA, BBA, BCA, and BHM, among others.



SET- Symbiosis International (Deemed University) administers the Symbiosis Entrance Test (SET) for admission to Symbiosis institutes. The SET test is a requirement for undergraduate admission to management, law, engineering, economics, mass communication, computer science, and liberal arts programmes.



CUCET- The Common University Entrance Test, formerly known as the Central Universities Common Entrance Test, is an all-India test administered by the National Testing Agency for admission to 45 Central Universities of India's
